# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint and the excerpt shows real empirical substance: quantitative metrics across 283 development sessions, interaction counts, infrastructure growth measurements, and observational case studies drawn from a 108,000-line codebase. That clears the admission bar for a serious preprint with reported experimental and operating results rather than generic commentary.

## Limits

# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint and the excerpt shows real empirical substance: quantitative metrics across 283 development sessions, interaction counts, infrastructure growth measurements, and observational case studies drawn from a 108,000-line codebase. That clears the admission bar for a serious preprint with reported experimental and operating results rather than generic commentary.

## Limits

Evidence appears to come from a single project and author-operated system, so downstream work should keep visible that the reported results are observational and may have limited external generalizability.
